creator: mmacy@nextbsd.org
text:
(In reply to Ben RUBSON from comment #5)
First of all, there shouldn't be any 40G drivers in GENERIC, that's just absurd. Even 10Gig drivers are maybe borderline. And yes, intel cards are much more pervasive than MLNX and don't require a compatibility layer to work.

If you read the post you'll see that automatic loading support has to be added on a driver by driver basis. So I'd suggest pushing for automatic loading support and provide a patch for mlxen.
